subcodes.first_line: It hath commenced by the command of God and returned unto Him, and verily He doth, at this moment, call thee and make mention of thee in this prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد بدئت بامر من الله و رجعت الیه و انه هو فی الحین ینادیک و یذکرک فی هذا السجن
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
